name: Ledger Compatibility Checker
description: A compatibility checker module for validating ledger schema files. It scans YAML schema files in a ledger registry to verify field classifications, check for annotation conflicts (gdpr_erasable vs immutable), validate GDPR erasure methods, and ensure audit fields have retention policies. Returns structured CheckResult objects with severity levels.

types.name: LedgerChecker
types.description: A compatibility checker class that extends CompatibilityChecker base class. Validates ledger schema files for field classifications, annotation conflicts, and policy compliance.

functions.name: tool_name
functions.description: Property method that returns the identifier for this compatibility checker tool

functions.name: check
functions.description: Performs compatibility checks on ledger schema files. Searches for a ledger registry, loads YAML schema files, and validates field classifications, annotation conflicts, GDPR erasure methods, and audit retention policies.

inputs.name: config
inputs.description: Configuration object containing stack settings including ledger_registry path

inputs.name: base_dir
inputs.description: Base directory to search for ledger registry

error_data.handling: silently caught and ignored with pass statement

error_cases.name: file_read_error
error_cases.condition: File cannot be opened or read

error_data.handling: silently caught and ignored with pass statement

preconditions: config must be a valid CartographerConfig instance
base_dir must be a valid Path object
postconditions: Returns a non-empty list containing at least one CheckResult
If no registry found, returns single INFO CheckResult with check_id 'ledger_registry_exists'
Each CheckResult has tool field set to 'ledger'
Classification check creates one result per schema file
Annotation conflicts create FAIL results for conflicting fields
GDPR erasable fields without erasure_method create WARN results
Audit fields without retention_policy create WARN results
side_effects: Reads YAML files from filesystem in registry_path

structured_side_effects.description: Loads and parses YAML schema files

functions.name: _find_registry
functions.description: Locates the ledger registry directory by checking configuration settings and common default paths. First checks config.stack.ledger_registry, then falls back to '.ledger/registry' and '.ledger' directories.

inputs.name: config
inputs.description: Configuration object that may contain ledger_registry path

inputs.name: base_dir
inputs.description: Base directory to resolve relative paths against

preconditions: config must be a valid CartographerConfig instance
base_dir must be a valid Path object
postconditions: Returns Path object if registry exists, otherwise None
Returned Path exists on filesystem if not None
Falls back to '.ledger/registry' then '.ledger' in base_dir

structured_side_effects.description: Checks if paths exist on filesystem

invariants: check() always returns at least one CheckResult
Classification FAIL severity when missing_classification > len(fields) // 2, otherwise WARN
Annotation conflicts between gdpr_erasable and immutable always result in FAIL severity
GDPR and audit policy violations result in WARN severity

data_access.rationale: Reads ledger schema YAML files from filesystem to perform validation checks

side_effects.rationale: Loads YAML schema files to validate field classifications and annotations
